response:
**Subject:** Farewell and Thank You

Dear Team,

As my time here comes to an end, I want to thank each of you for the support, collaboration, and friendships that made this journey so meaningful. I’ve learned so much from all of you and will truly miss working alongside such a talented and kind group. Please stay in touch—I’d love to hear about your future successes and catch up over coffee. Wishing you all the best in the next chapter, and I hope our paths cross again soon. Thank you for everything!

Best,
[Your Name]
